image:image.image:title: Earnify — Browser-Based CPU Mining for Publishers
image:image.image:caption: Monetize your website with browser-based compute. No ads. No tracking. Open source. 10% fee.

video:video.video:title: Earnify — Quick Start Tutorial
video:video.video:description: Complete walkthrough from creating your RavenCoin wallet to seeing your first shares submitted to the pool. Covers script tag integration, thread configuration, and real-time monitoring.

image:image.image:title: Earnify Blog — Publisher Monetization Insights
image:image.image:caption: Expert guides on website monetization, browser-based compute, privacy compliance, and ad-free revenue strategies.

image:image.image:title: How to Monetize Your Website Without Ads
image:image.image:caption: Learn the most effective ways to generate revenue from your website without relying on invasive display advertising or tracking cookies.

image:image.image:title: MinotaurX vs Power2B — Algorithm Comparison
image:image.image:caption: Technical comparison of mining algorithms for browser-based compute with real-world hashrate benchmarks.

image:image.image:title: Browser-Based Mining GDPR Compliance — Legal Guide
image:image.image:caption: Complete legal guide covering GDPR, CCPA, and ePrivacy compliance for browser-based compute monetization.

image:image.image:title: The History of Web Mining — From Coinhive to Earnify
image:image.image:caption: Complete evolution of browser-based cryptocurrency mining from Coinhive's 2017 dominance to modern open-source architecture.

image:image.image:title: Browser Mining 2026 Profitability — Revenue Data
image:image.image:caption: Honest browser mining revenue data for 2026: RVN earnings per visitor, comparison vs ads, and a 5-minute setup guide.

image:image.image:title: Coinhive Alternatives 2026 — Best Browser Mining Solutions
image:image.image:caption: Compare the top Coinhive alternatives for 2026 — Earnify, CryptoLoot, Coinimp, and more with real features, fees, and privacy analysis.

image:image.image:title: Recover Revenue Lost to Ad Blockers with Browser Mining
image:image.image:caption: Ad blockers cost publishers up to 42.7% of display revenue. Learn how browser-based compute recovers that lost income.

image:image.image:title: Zero-Server Infrastructure — Earnify Architecture
image:image.image:caption: Deep-dive into Earnify's browser-only mining architecture: Web Workers, WASM MinotaurX hashing, Socket.IO Stratum relay.

image:image.image:title: Browser Mining for Freelancers & Agencies
image:image.image:caption: Why freelancers and agency owners should add Earnify browser mining to every client site — and how to propose it with confidence.

image:image.image:title: How Browser-Based Mining Works — Technical Guide
image:image.image:caption: End-to-end technical explanation — stratum protocol, Web Workers, WASM, pool integration, and reward distribution.

image:image.image:title: Case Study — Publisher 3x Revenue with Browser Mining
image:image.image:caption: Real publisher case study — 3x revenue by layering opt-in browser mining alongside existing ad monetization.

image:image.image:title: Mining Opt-In UX Design — Best Practices
image:image.image:caption: UX patterns, dark patterns to avoid, and A/B-tested opt-in designs that maximize mining consent rates ethically.

image:image.image:title: Browser Mining vs Display Ads: Revenue Per Visitor Compared
image:image.image:caption: A data-driven comparison of browser-based crypto mining and traditional display advertising revenue per visitor. Learn which monetization method earns more and when to use each.

image:image.image:title: How to Add Earnify to Your WordPress Site in 5 Minutes
image:image.image:caption: Step-by-step guide to integrating Earnify's browser-based crypto mining on your WordPress site. No plugins, no backend changes—just one script tag and 5 minutes.

image:image.image:title: The Environmental Impact of Browser Mining: Fact vs Fiction
image:image.image:caption: Does browser-based crypto mining destroy the planet? We analyze real energy data, compare browser mining to traditional mining and ad tech, and separate fact from fiction.

image:image.image:title: Cryptojacking vs Legitimate Browser Mining: How to Tell the Difference
image:image.image:caption: Learn the key differences between malicious cryptojacking and legitimate browser-based cryptocurrency mining. Discover how publishers can ethically monetize traffic with Earnify's transparent, consent-based solution.
